item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya tidak setuju dengan pendapat yang menyatakan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu mendahulukan hak individu.

notes: Agent A starts by agreeing with society-first priority but includes a balance caveat, then visibly shifts by turn 3 and turn 5 toward rights protection, minority voices, transparency, and limits on collective priority. Agent B stays mostly near a balance/rights-protection position throughout. Agent B's turn 6 opening uses an awkward double negative, but the surrounding text still emphasizes protecting individual rights and balancing collective welfare. Agent B turn 2 contains non-Latin script in 'lead to忽视 individual voices and rights'.
